name: FATCA Withholding Waiver for Non-Financial Foreign Entities

eligibility.description: Applies to non-financial foreign entities (NFFEs) that provide a certification of no substantial U.S. owners or disclose the identity of U.S. owners to the withholding agent.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoids a 30% withholding tax on U.S. source payments to foreign entities by providing certifications regarding substantial U.S. ownership.
